queries.query: Proofread my IEEE conference paper main.tex and tighten the abstract.
Fix my LaTeX manuscript — there are some grammar issues and the related work needs polishing.
Check my .tex file for booktabs three-line table compliance and Algorithm 1 formatting.
Improve the writing of my NeurIPS submission — sentences are too long and the logic flow is weak.
Help me derive the research gap from my related work section in this LaTeX paper.
Convert my algorithm2e block to algpseudocodex and make Require/Ensure consistent.
My ACM submission won't compile — fix the BibTeX/biber errors and verify citations.
Adapt this Springer LNCS template paper for IEEE Access submission.
Run a de-AI pass on my .tex paper to remove obvious AI tone words.
Translate the experiment section of my Chinese paper into academic English LaTeX.
Search my references.bib for Mamba forecasting papers after 2024.
Act as a strict reviewer and write a peer-review report on my paper with major/minor issues.
Gate-check this submission and tell me whether it is ready to submit.
Polish my Chinese master's thesis chapter on literature review.
Fix my Typst paper compilation error in main.typ.
Write a survey on industrial anomaly detection with Industry 4.0 framing.
Help me draft a vacation request email to my manager.
Debug this Python script that crashes on numpy import.
